title: Maximize Palindrome Length From Subsequences
titleCn: 由子序列构造的最长回文串的长度

testcases.input: word1 = "cacb", word2 = "cbba" Output: 5 Explanation: Choose "ab" from word1 and "cba" from word2 to make "abcba", which is a palindrome.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: Choose "ab" from word1 and "cba" from word2 to make "abcba", which is a palindrome.

testcases.input: word1 = "ab", word2 = "ab" Output: 3 Explanation: Choose "ab" from word1 and "a" from word2 to make "aba", which is a palindrome.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: Choose "ab" from word1 and "a" from word2 to make "aba", which is a palindrome.

testcases.input: word1 = "aa", word2 = "bb" Output: 0 Explanation: You cannot construct a palindrome from the described method, so return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: You cannot construct a palindrome from the described method, so return 0.
